## SECURE CHECKOUT

![](https://soldancemovement.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/dividerBALCK.png)

\[tec\_tickets\_checkout\]

![](https://soldancemovement.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/securecheckout2.png)

![Sol Dance Ecstatic dance](https://soldancemovement.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/logogoldSMALL.png)

SolDance is a free-form movement experience where all bodies are welcomed. We offer a gently guided sensory journey meant to be experienced in its entirety, combining a culturally diverse blend of electronic and acoustic sounds skillfully attuned to the group’s energy.

[Join our private Facebook group →](https://www.facebook.com/groups/618533368617125/)

[Sign up for our newsletter →](https://soldancemovement.com/newsletter)
